title: AI Research Assistant, Speckle Imaging Lab
points: Developed a Multi Node LangGraph research automation workflow to streamline biomedical dataset validation, video generation, labeling, corrupted file detection, dataset organization, and experiment orchestration, reducing manual preprocessing effort and accelerating model development cycles.

Engineered a reusable feature extraction framework that transformed raw Laser Speckle Contrast Imaging data into machine learning ready datasets, removing preprocessing bottlenecks for downstream AI experimentation.

Evaluated DenseNet121, feature engineering workflows, and deep learning pipelines for biomedical image classification and developmental stage prediction, improving model selection and experiment reliability.
Selected for the paid AIRS Summer Fellowship 2026 by the Stevens Institute for Artificial Intelligence to advance AI driven developmental stage classification using biomedical imaging data.
Fine tuned a MentalBERT Transformer Model for multi class depression severity classification, achieving 81% accuracy across Highly Depressed, Moderately Depressed, and Not Depressed categories.

title: Full Stack AI Engineer
points: Built an end-to-end AI extraction platform that converts noisy oncology conference webpages into validated structured datasets using FastAPI, React, RAG, and FAISS vector search.
Designed a Multi-Agent LangGraph workflow for webpage extraction, retrieval, JSON generation, validation, and retry-based correction, reducing manual extraction effort by approximately 80%.
Implemented Pydantic validation and retry logic with automated correction loops to detect malformed JSON, regenerate invalid fields, and improve structured output reliability.
Developed embedding-based retrieval pipelines with chunking, vector search, and semantic ranking to ground LLM outputs, reduce hallucination risk, and improve extraction accuracy.
Integrated FastAPI services with a React interface and processed approximately 100 webpages, converting unstructured medical web content into validated JSON.

title: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer
points: Built an LLM powered automation system using Python, Bitbucket APIs, and prompt engineering to summarize release branch commits, generate release notes, and improve stakeholder visibility across release cycles.
Owned full stack internet banking modules across React, Redux, Java Spring Boot, and PostgreSQL, improving delivery ownership for customer facing banking features.
Mentored and guided a team of 5 engineers through code reviews, task delegation, pair programming, and maintainable coding practices.
Improved engineering productivity by introducing build automation, reusable React components, and boilerplate generation scripts, saving 2+ engineering hours daily.
Improved frontend architecture using Micro Frontends and Redux Toolkit, reducing page load time by 50% and improving user experience.
Improved code quality, deployment stability, and security compliance, achieving an AppSec Security Score of 94% and reducing deployment defects by 20%.

title: Full Stack Software Engineer
points: Built and maintained large scale full stack banking applications using React, Redux, Java Spring Boot, and PostgreSQL for internet banking workflows.
Developed 15+ backend microservices supporting request validation, authentication flows, customer account workflows, and internal banking operations.
Delivered end to end modules including Profile, Accounts, Payee Management, Alerts Management, and Fund Transfers across frontend UI and backend APIs.
Developed a standalone payment gateway application processing approximately 400 transactions daily, supporting reliable digital payment workflows.
Supported deployment of React applications and Spring Boot microservices using Git based collaboration and release workflows.

title: Front End Software Engineer
points: Developed responsive internet banking interfaces using React, Redux, Redux Saga, and Material UI for customer facing banking modules.
Designed reusable React components and shared UI patterns to improve interface consistency, reduce repeated development effort, and accelerate feature delivery.
Partnered with UX designers, product managers, and backend engineers to translate banking requirements into reliable production features.
Resolved frontend defects, API integration issues, and performance bottlenecks across banking modules, improving application stability and user experience.
Followed Agile delivery practices using Git, Jira, code reviews, and regular release cycles.

title: Frontend Developer
points: Built and maintained a cross platform logistics application using React Native, Redux, Material UI, and JavaScript.
Resolved 200+ defects and performance issues, improving application stability, usability, and release readiness.
Developed Node.js automation scripts to generate reusable boilerplate code from templates, reducing repetitive development effort and saving approximately 4 hours daily for the team.
Conducted weekly stakeholder demonstrations to gather feedback, validate requirements, and align application features with business needs.
